calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-15-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-06-2014 Continued To Oct-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar May-09-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Paolini for Linda Pioli.

The Court read the following attestation clause from the will: "The foregoing instrument, consisting of three pages, including this page, was, on the day it bears date, by said JUNE BONINI, signed, published and declared to be her Last Will and Testament, in the presence of us, who, at her request and in her presence, and in the presence of each other, have subscribed our names as witnesses thereto." The Court approved the Petition for Probate(subject to review of written order).

Judge:Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Apr-09-2013 Continued To May-07-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
